classes.reasoning: This is explicitly labeled 'eCRF -- CYCLE 3 DAY 1 VISIT' at the top and contains structured per-patient, per-visit data capture fields including vital signs, ECOG status, study drug dispensing details, concomitant medications, adverse events, and PRO questionnaires with investigator signature.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form capturing data from a Cycle 3 Day 1 visit for patient BRC471-NL01-002 at site NL-01. The form documents vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing (200mg BID dosing with ondansetron), concomitant medications, adverse events (acneiform rash and fatigue), and completion of PRO questionnaires, verified by investigator Dr. R. de Boer on 22 November 2023.
